paragraphs: Embedded Software Engineer with 4 years developing firmware on CAN-based multi-ECU architectures. Proven ability to own problems end-to-end, from hardware bring-up to manufacturing support.

Delivered a cross-generation Software Thread Watchdog (ARM Cortex-M4/embOS and Cortex-M7/MQX), reduced build times by ~65%, and unblocked stalled production lines. Experienced in V-model development, HIL testing, and cross-site collaboration with teams across Mexico, the US, and China.
achievements: 65% faster builds (20+ min down to ~7 min)
Cross-generation Software Thread Watchdog deployed on two hardware platforms (embOS & MQX)

education.school: Tecnológico de Monterrey (ITESM) | Nuevo León, México
education.degree: B.S. in Digital Systems and Robotics Engineering — 2023
education.note: Full Scholarship "Líderes del Mañana" — awarded for academic excellence and leadership potential.
